fields.Name: Voice Co-Agent - Progress Narration
fields.Description: One-off spoken-update instructions the Voice Co-Agent's realtime model receives while a delegated target-agent run is in flight. Contains a {{ progressMessage }} placeholder the client substitutes with the live progress message. Enforces strictly first-person narration (the co-agent owns the work): one short sentence, an explicit rewrite example, a ban on 'it'/the agent's name as the sentence subject, no repeated updates, and no generic filler. Resolved by name at session prepare time and threaded to the browser; clients fall back to built-in wording when this prompt is absent.
